introduction.objective: To deliver training courses through online media and register students for online as well as live training programs.

online_standard_training_setup.description: Online standard training courses deliver a mix of media-based learning materials including videos, audios, text, along with assignments and assessments.

steps: User clicks 'New Course' button under a training category (Categories created by Admin)
System shows entry fields to enter title of the Course
User enters the title
System asks user to select: Scheduled / Non-Scheduled
User selects appropriate option
If Scheduled: System asks to specify total duration allowed for course completion
User specifies total duration
System saves the details
User clicks 'Add Objective' button
System shows entry fields for course objective
User enters objective and saves
System shows entry fields for descriptive details (text entry and image upload available)
User adds text entry/image upload fields, enters content, uploads images and saves
System adds inputs to the newly added training course
User clicks 'Course Structure' button
System asks to specify number of lessons to be included
User specifies number of lessons
System asks to specify number of weeks or days for course structure
User specifies weeks or days
System equally divides lessons across weeks and displays lesson list on a weekly basis with entry fields for lesson names
User enters names of lessons
System shows entry fields to add topics to each lesson (any number of subtopics allowed)
User adds subtopics under each lesson
System asks to add sessions for each topic
User adds sessions to each topic
System displays all details as specified in the course structure

add_main_session.description: Main session is a video, flash video, audio, or text material.
steps: User clicks 'Add Content' button
System asks to select: video (flash), audio, text format
User selects appropriate content format
System shows 'Video Upload' button and/or drag-and-drop function
User uploads or drag-and-drops video files as required
If user wants interactive questions during video:
User clicks 'Timeliner' button
System displays video player with timeliner function
User sets timeline for the question
System shows entry fields for question text, options, and correct option
User enters question text, options, marks correct option and submits
System shows two conditions: If answer is correct / If answer is incorrect
System asks user to set timeline for each condition
User sets timelines for both conditions
Rule: When test taker selects an answer, system moves to the respective video material tagged to correct/incorrect condition, then continues playing
System saves the interactive question inputs
System shows 'Audio Upload' button and/or drag-and-drop function
User uploads or drag-and-drops audio files as required
If user wants interactive questions during audio: same process as video with audio player
System shows 'Text Upload' button and/or drag-and-drop function
User uploads or drag-and-drops text files as required
If user wants to embed video/audio within text:
User clicks 'Embed a video/audio' button
System shows field to embed the video/audio
User enters source details of the video/audio and submits
System saves the details

add_assignments.description: User adds additional training materials through videos, audios, doc files, YouTube links, websites etc. Assignments are NOT part of main session but additional study materials.
steps: User clicks 'Add Assignments' button
System shows various options for attaching assignments: embed video/audio/document links, website links, etc.
User embeds/links required sources to the session
If user wants students to submit reports:
System shows option: Enable Report Submission
User clicks 'Enable Report' button
System shows entry fields for description and instruction for the report
User adds description and instructions
System saves input details and enables report submission function
add_assignments.rule: When end-user (student) submits the report, a notification is sent to the trainer. Trainer can open and view the report, give a score/rating, and enter feedback.

adding_assessments.description: User can include assessments/tests at different points as part of training.
adding_assessments.note: Assessments can be scored or unscored, with reports or without reports.

add_assessment_during_session.description: Within the main session, there may be multiple short videos or audios sequentially arranged and spaced/interlinked by assessments.
steps: User clicks 'Add Assessment' button
System shows entry fields for assessment title, objective, and description/instruction
User enters inputs and submits
System shows filters to select questions from question bank
User applies filters, selects questions, and assigns to assessment
System shows assessment design features
User configures the assessment
If user wants to add a report: user defines report per the 'general report' process
User clicks 'Interlink' button
System shows session contents and assessments with facility to sequentially interlink them
User interlinks session contents and assessments
System saves the interlink inputs
User clicks 'Automatic Sequence' button
System asks user to enable automatic/manual sequence of session contents
User enables appropriate option
System saves sequencing inputs

add_assessment_end_of_session_topic_less.description: User can add assessment at the end of a session, topic, lesson, or course. Process is same as section 2.4.1.

adding_summary_live_session.description: User can add live session at the end of a week or two weeks. Live sessions are conducted online by trainer periodically.
steps: User clicks 'Add Live Session' button
System asks to specify number of live sessions, objectives, and schedule
User specifies details about live sessions and submits
System saves the inputs

setting_parameters_for_course_completion.description: User can set conditions for completion of a session, lesson, and course.
steps: User clicks 'Parameters for Course Completion' button
System shows all course contents (including assignments and assessments) and their schedule
User checks contents in each session/lesson/course to be mandatory for completion

online_live_training_setup.description: Online-live courses are ZOOM classrooms. Trainer creates a course, defines structure, assignments, and assessments (except main session) as above, and delivers Zoom sessions.
features: Zoom-setup facilities available on the system
User can schedule online sessions in advance or on an ongoing basis
System provides notification facilities for end-users
System shows end-user a registration form for admission
Registration details are viewable on trainer's dashboard

offline_live_training_setup.description: Offline-live courses are real-time classroom sessions. Trainer creates course, defines structure, assignments, and assessments (except main session), and delivers live classroom sessions.
features: User can schedule classroom sessions in advance or on an ongoing basis
System provides notification facilities for end-users
System shows end-user a registration form for admission
Registration details are viewable on trainer's dashboard

training_management_process.description: Trainer-user can modify course contents with Admin permission.
allowed_modifications: Replacing main session contents with new ones
not_allowed: Course structure cannot be modified by trainer (Admin only)
Deleting a course is the right of Admin only
daily_management_tasks: Check messages from end-users and respond
View assignment reports submitted by end-users and give feedback and scores
Check schedule of live-online sessions and fix date/time and notify end-users

steps: User clicks 'Scheduler' button
System shows the scheduler
User sets the ZOOM meeting and clicks 'Notify' button
System saves the schedule details
scheduler_process.note: When student opens course page, a popup notification about upcoming event (Live Session) appears with meeting link. When student clicks 'Consent' button, notification goes back to trainer about student participation.

training_registration_process.description: End-user initiates registration for a training course.
steps: End-User clicks on a training course
System shows general structure of the course and other details
User clicks 'Register' to register for the course
System displays a registration form
User fills the form and submits
System takes user to payment process
User makes necessary payment
System shows detailed structure of the course with active contents for the user to start training
Rule: If training course is scheduled, course duration starts from this time
User takes the program at his convenience
System provides following feedbacks on course progression on each entry:
- Course Completion Status
- Time Tracker (Time-spent, Time-left)
- Score report (so far obtained)
- Feedbacks and messages from trainer/admin
- Option to resume from where last left
